title: Dense Passage Retrieval for Open-Domain Question Answering

defines.name: Dense Passage Retriever (DPR)
defines.definition: A dual-encoder dense retrieval model that embeds questions and passages into a shared vector space and retrieves relevant passages by maximizing inner products.

problem: Traditional sparse retrieval methods like TF-IDF and BM25 are effective but fail to capture semantic matches needed for high-quality open-domain QA retrieval.
